CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-10-2011 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-29-2011 Continued To Jun-24-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove Up
Off Calendar May-10-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

ELIZABETH MACDONALD, Esq.special appearance For plaintiff(s) FORD MOTOR CREDIT CO.,
Plaintiff's Witness:ANTHONY BASCIO was placed under oath and direct examined.

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) TEDDY MANDANG for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $29,051.17
Prejudgment Interest - $3323.10
Attorney's Fees - $2905.12
Costs - $488.00
Total judgment in the amount of $35,767.39

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
